description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a hip roof and a mix of modern and traditional architectural elements. The exterior features a combination of light-colored siding on the upper floor and stone or brickwork on the lower level. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and landscaped sections with palm trees and shrubs. The backyard appears to have a private seating area enclosed by a low wall. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence with both functional and decorative outdoor spaces.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, large windows, mixed siding and stone exterior, and landscaped outdoor areas with palm trees and patio furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio area, and a row of palm trees along the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio seating area, low wall, and windows along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, landscaped garden with palm trees, and a more private backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the main walkway, front lawn, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, steps, and adjacent patio area with outdoor furniture.
